issue_summary: Reduce contention in older/buggy JVMs when using AttributeSource#addAttribute() because java.lang.ref.ReferenceQueue#poll() is implemented using synchronization.
javadoc_after:
/** Returns an iterator over all values of this map.
   * This iterator may return values whose key is already
   * garbage collected while iterator is consumed,
   * especially if {@code reapOnRead} is {@code false}. */
